title: alyssum engelmannii
intro: Alyssum engelmannii, also known as Engelmann's Alyssum, is a perennial herb belonging to the Brassicaceae family. It is native to the southwestern United States and Mexico, and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Alyssum engelmannii include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and support immune function. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is also used in traditional folk remedies to treat various health conditions.
